title: 7 Best MailerLite Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Explore top MailerLite alternatives for email marketing. Compare free and paid options for small businesses, creators, and e-commerce brands.
intro: While MailerLite excels at simplicity and affordability, different businesses have different needs. Whether you're looking for more advanced automation, industry-specific features, or better pricing, there are excellent alternatives worth considering. We've compiled the best MailerLite alternatives across different use cases to help you find your next email marketing home.
why_switch: Need more advanced automation or CRM capabilities beyond basic workflows
Looking for industry-specific features like e-commerce integrations or webinar hosting
Want higher free tier limits or different pricing structures that better suit your business model

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.best_for: Growing businesses needing multi-channel marketing and transactional email
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers an exceptionally generous free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers and unlimited emails, making it ideal if you're scaling quickly without budget constraints. It combines email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat in one platform, providing far more channel diversity than MailerLite.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.best_for: Newsletter publishers and content creators seeking monetization
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter growth with built-in monetization features, ad networks, and referral programs that MailerLite doesn't offer. If recurring revenue from your audience is your goal, Beehiiv's tools are specifically designed to help you achieve that.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.best_for: Bloggers, course creators, and digital product sellers
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is tailored for creator economies with built-in commerce features, visual automation, and subscriber tagging designed specifically for selling courses and digital products. It maintains a 1,000 subscriber free tier like MailerLite but with creator-focused tools as standard.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses requiring enterprise-grade automation and customer relationship management
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign provides advanced automation workflows, lead scoring, and integrated CRM functionality that goes far beyond MailerLite's capabilities. It's the choice for businesses that have outgrown simple email marketing and need sophisticated customer journey mapping.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands using Shopify, WooCommerce, or BigCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce with predictive analytics, intelligent segmentation, and seamless shopping platform integrations that MailerLite's more general toolset can't match. If your revenue depends on online sales, Klaviyo's commerce-focused features drive significantly better ROI.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse bundles email marketing with webinar hosting, online course creation, and conversion funnels—features MailerLite doesn't provide natively. It's a one-stop shop for entrepreneurs selling educational content or running live events.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.best_for: Beginners and small businesses wanting an established, familiar platform
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is one of the oldest and most recognized email marketing platforms with a lower free tier ceiling (500 subscribers vs. MailerLite's 1,000) but more integrations available. It's best if you need broad compatibility with third-party tools and prefer working with an industry standard.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to MailerLite?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers and unlimited emails, making it excellent for growing businesses. However, if you need more specialized features, Beehiiv offers 2,500 free subscribers with newsletter monetization tools, while ConvertKit provides 1,000 subscribers with creator-focused features.

faq.q: What is the best MailerLite alternative for small business?
faq.a: Brevo and Mailchimp are both excellent for small businesses with affordable paid plans starting around $13-$25/month and strong automation features. For small e-commerce businesses specifically, Klaviyo offers superior product recommendation and segmentation tools despite its higher starting price of $45/month.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to MailerLite?
faq.a: Brevo is effectively cheaper with a much larger free tier (100,000 vs. 1,000 subscribers) and similar paid pricing starting at $25/month. Substack is free forever with unlimited subscribers if you're monetizing through paid subscriptions rather than traditional marketing campaigns.
